name: Staging gate — set pending on PR open

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [staging]
    types: [opened, reopened, synchronize]

permissions:
  statuses: write

jobs:
  pending:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            await github.rest.repos.createCommitStatus({
              owner:       context.repo.owner,
              repo:        context.repo.repo,
              sha:         context.payload.pull_request.head.sha,
              state:       'pending',
              context:     'playwright / staging-gate',
              description: 'Waiting for manual QA gate — must be run by a QA engineer',
            })
